notes: 100% coverage means every CUDA backend-independent surface is classified, not that portable WGSL matches CUDA natively.
Verified requires tests[]; Optimized requires bench=true; Portable Verified requires portable_tests or wasm/browser evidence.
GPU f32 hubs for BF16/F16-without-feature are GPUEmulated, not Native.
